metadata.title: Who Ate the Birthday Cake?
metadata.one_liner: A slice of birthday cake went missing before the party even started!

visual.palette: pastel pink, butter yellow, and garden green

cover.summary: A birthday cake mystery with a missing slice, party ribbons, and a child detective.

narrative.premise: A slice of Lily's birthday cake vanished from the kitchen just before the party. Can you discover who sneaked a bite?
starting_knowledge: A slice is missing from the birthday cake.

locations.name: Kitchen
locations.description: A warm kitchen that smells like sugar and vanilla.
search_context: Sticky fingerprints shine on the cake plate.
A ribbon-like pink hair bow lies near the table.

visual.summary: A cheerful kitchen with a cake stand, mixing bowls, and party plates.

locations.name: Garden
locations.description: A sunny garden filled with flowers for the party table.
search_context: Fresh soil clings to a pair of gardening gloves.
Flower baskets sit ready by the door.

visual.summary: A bright garden with flowers, gloves, and a path back to the house.

locations.name: Living Room
locations.description: A cosy room with a big sofa and Grandpa's quiz show on the television.
search_context: A crossword book rests on the sofa cushion.
A tea mug is still warm on the table.

visual.summary: A comfy living room with a sofa, crossword, and softly glowing television.

roleplay.persona: A bubbly little sister who fidgets when she is hiding something.
roleplay.background: She adores sweets and can never wait for dessert.
roleplay.attitude: Shy and wiggly around the investigator.

characters.private_alibi: I was playing with my dolls in my bedroom.
characters.private_motive: She could not resist the cake.

visual.summary: A small girl with curly red hair, a pink bow, and a little icing smear.

roleplay.persona: A jolly grandpa who talks warmly and loves snacks.
roleplay.background: He arrived early to help with the party.
roleplay.attitude: Happy to help and very chatty.

characters.private_alibi: I was on the sofa doing my crossword.
characters.private_motive: He loves cake and looks suspicious at first.

visual.summary: A smiling grandpa in a blue cardigan with round glasses.

roleplay.persona: A kind, organised baker who is worried about the missing slice.
roleplay.background: She baked the birthday cake this morning.

characters.private_alibi: I was in the garden picking flowers.

visual.summary: A parent in a yellow apron carrying muddy garden gloves.

evidence.player_text: One neat slice is missing from the birthday cake.
evidence.fact_summary: The theft happened at the cake table in the kitchen.

evidence.player_text: A pink hair bow is on the kitchen floor by the cake table.
evidence.fact_summary: Poppy dropped her bow beside the cake.

evidence.player_text: Grandpa's open crossword shows he stayed in the living room.
evidence.fact_summary: Grandpa has a steady innocent alibi.

evidence.player_text: Poppy whispers that the cake looked too yummy to wait for.

ground_truth.what_happened: Poppy sneaked into the kitchen and ate a slice of birthday cake.
ground_truth.why_it_happened: She loved the cake and could not wait for the party.
ground_truth.explanation: Poppy stayed near the cake, dropped her pink bow, and ate a slice while Mom was in the garden and Grandpa stayed on the sofa.

suspect_truths.actual_activity: She sneaked to the cake table and ate a slice.
suspect_truths.stated_alibi: I was playing with my dolls in my bedroom.
suspect_truths.motive: She could not resist the cake.

suspect_truths.actual_activity: He stayed on the sofa with his crossword.
suspect_truths.stated_alibi: I was on the sofa doing my crossword.
suspect_truths.motive: He likes cake but did not take it.

suspect_truths.actual_activity: She picked flowers in the garden.
suspect_truths.stated_alibi: I was in the garden picking flowers.

timeline.summary: Mom goes to the garden for flowers.
Poppy sneaks to the cake table and eats a slice.
Grandpa stays in the living room with his crossword.
